title: Invensis Technologies Uses Edstellar to Streamline Training Process

sections.title: The Challenge
content: The internal training team at Invensis, a 5000-member BPO company, wanted to deliver a wide range of training to upskill their teams across the organization. As a result, Invensis had to train close to 2000 employees for 48 courses at different locations with several training requirements in the shortest possible duration. One of the biggest challenges was onboarding multiple training vendors for technical, behavioral, and management training programs.

The process of selecting training vendors, verifying their competencies, aligning them with training projects, and negotiating with them was a mammoth task. Since there were multiple vendors, communication became unstructured, and the training process lacked standardization.
The challenge for Invensis was to standardize the vendor management process, improve learning outcomes, and save time for the training team.

sections.title: The Result
content: With the help of Edstellar, an integrated managed training services platform, Invensis Technologies completed 60 training projects in a standardized format within two months.
The company also reduced the time spent on vendor shortlisting and selection by 90%.

sections.title: Company Introduction
content: Invensis Technologies Pvt. Ltd. is a leading provider of information technology, business process, and knowledge process services with over 5000 employees across multiple locations. As the company expanded, it recognized the need for continuous employee learning and development to ensure workforce readiness.

sections.title: Finalizing Training Vendors - A Mammoth Task
content: Invensis Technologies, a BPO organization, has extensive and continuously growing training requirements. Managing training needs and executing learning programs for such a large workforce was a challenge before adopting Edstellar.
Previously, the internal training team spent several days identifying suitable vendors, shortlisting trainers, negotiating costs, and coordinating training execution.

Every new training initiative required repeating the same vendor selection and onboarding process. Edstellar streamlined this workflow by eliminating the repetitive effort involved in choosing trainers.

quotes.author: Aakrithi
quotes.text: Our main challenge was investing almost one week to finalize vendors. We had to constantly follow up with vendors and negotiate training requirements. Finding the right trainer involved contacting multiple trainers and vendors just to check availability.
We needed a better way to efficiently and affordably train our employees, so we turned to Edstellar for a solution.

sections.title: Standardized Training Management Process
content: Because Invensis relied on different vendors for different training requirements, each engagement required onboarding new vendors and trainers. This resulted in inconsistent vendor management processes.
The company wanted a standardized training management process to eliminate inconsistent communication and operational practices.
Edstellar's SaaS platform enabled Invensis to create customized learning programs while maintaining a standardized process for every training initiative.

quotes.author: Jose
quotes.text: A platform with standard operating procedures for end-to-end training is what we were seeking.

Before implementing Edstellar, we struggled to provide targeted and effective training to our employees. The platform helped us deliver personalized and standardized training experiences that meet each employee's specific needs and goals.

sections.title: Standardize Learning Outcome
content: Alongside standardizing vendor management, Invensis wanted consistent learning outcomes and measurable training effectiveness.
Managing learning outcomes across hundreds of employees was difficult because there was limited visibility into training performance.
Edstellar provided advanced training analytics and reporting, enabling Invensis to monitor training performance in real time and make informed decisions.

quotes.author: Kirthi
quotes.text: It was frustrating to invest time and resources into training without being able to see the results and measure the impact on our employees and our business.
We had limited visibility into the impact of our training programs, making it difficult to track and measure results and make necessary adjustments.

sections.title: Increasing Training Resource Utilization
content: Edstellar helped Invensis save nearly 90% of the time previously spent managing training operations.
The time saved enabled the training team to organize significantly more learning sessions and improve overall resource utilization.

quotes.author: Aakrithi
quotes.text: We can now execute training in almost two days, whereas it previously took more than a week. Edstellar TMS is a time-savior for us. We now use the saved time to organize additional training, and our monthly training sessions have increased nearly fivefold.

sections.title: The Way Up
content: Invensis Technologies plans to continue using Edstellar's Training Management Software for all ongoing and future learning requirements.
Edstellar's network of verified trainers enables Invensis to deliver customized training while ensuring expected business outcomes.
The organization considers Edstellar a strategic partner for large-scale training because it provides access to trainers for every course and significantly reduces vendor selection time.

sections.title: Edstellar Revolutionizing Training Industry
content: Edstellar provides Invensis with an integrated platform for scheduling annual training programs, managing participants, and coordinating learning activities from a single interface.
Dedicated training coordinators simplify execution, while verified trainers deliver customized learning experiences tailored to organizational needs.
Using Edstellar's analytics and BI capabilities, Invensis can monitor employee performance and measure training effectiveness across the organization.
